changes_made.description: Removed unused variable 'fixturesPath' (dead code) in 'should integrate skills into command groups' test
Fixed inconsistent indentation on two '} finally {' blocks (lines 447 and 468 in original) that were missing leading spaces
Removed extra blank line between logger mock setup and first describe block

no_change_files.src/lib/slash-commands.ts: Code is clean: no dead code, no unused imports, error handling is consistent, security measures comprehensive. DRY duplication between loadSkills/loadCodexSkills is intentional per design decision (YAGNI: defer until 3rd skill source).
no_change_files.src/app/api/worktrees/[id]/slash-command: Code is clean: all imports used, source counting with 4 filter calls is acceptable for readability given small array size, error handling is correct.
no_change_files.src/types/slash-commands.ts: Type definitions are well-structured and complete. No issues found.

summary: Refactoring scope was minimal. The implementation code (slash-commands.ts, route.ts, types) is well-structured with no code smells. The DRY duplication between loadSkills() and loadCodexSkills() is acknowledged but intentionally deferred per design decision (YAGNI). Test file had minor cleanup: removed an unused variable, fixed two indentation inconsistencies on 'finally' blocks, and removed an extra blank line. All 45 slash-commands tests pass. Note: one pre-existing test failure exists in git-utils.test.ts (unrelated to Issue #166).
